name: Record of Lodoss War
overview: Born in battle, baptized in fire, it's kingdoms have been ravaged by war for thousands of years.  Now, an evil stirs, an ancient goddess of destruction awakened by an evil wizard.  A party of six is forged to defeat this threat, or die in the attempt.  Join Parn, the young fighter, as he leads his warriors into the heart of a land where dragons rule and evil holds sway over the earth.  Six swords are now drawn against this darkness.  The war for Lodoss has begun!

trailers.title: Record of Lodoss War - Opening | Kiseki no Umi
